summary: Dependency-confusion squat exfiltrates host/user info on install
details: This package targets an internal '@design-system-coopeuch' scope at version 999.0.0 to override a private-registry 4.6.1 release via dependency confusion. Its package.json declares a 'preinstall' lifecycle hook that runs 'node cb.js'. cb.js collects os.hostname(), os.userInfo().username, __dirname, and the output of 'whoami', then POSTs them as JSON over plain HTTP to a hardcoded bare IP at http://157.173.126.113:8443/dep-confusion. Any developer or CI system that runs 'npm install' without the internal.npmrc configured will silently send host identifiers and working-directory information to that endpoint at install time. A STEPS.md shipped in the tarball explicitly documents the package as a dependency-confusion weapon against the targeted scope.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
